# Lastpresso

Lastpresso is a matcha and espresso café in Edling, Bavaria, Germany, approximately 8 km from Wasserburg am Inn and 25 km from Rosenheim. The café was founded by Zara Nur Kara and combines specialty coffee drinks with Turkish street food.

## Location

Address: Hauptstraße 29, 83533 Edling, Bayern, Germany
Phone: +49 176 31661965
Email: lastpressocoffee@gmail.com
Website: https://lastpresso.de/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cafelastpresso

## Opening Hours

Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday: 11:30–20:00
Sunday: 12:00–19:00
Wednesday: Closed (Ruhetag)

## Menu

The café serves handcrafted matcha lattes, espresso drinks, and Tantuni — a Turkish street food dish of spiced beef served in flatbread. Menu items include Iced Matcha Latte (from €6.50), Iced Caramel Macchiato (€6.50), bagels, and sweets. Customers can customise matcha drinks with fruit purées (strawberry, mango, banana), milk alternatives (oat, coconut, almond, lactose-free), and syrups (vanilla, caramel, coconut, hazelnut, maple).

## Reviews

Rated 5.0 out of 5 based on 48 Google reviews. Guests praise the friendly service, cosy atmosphere, and quality drinks.
